resetPassword.title: New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new secure password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidToken: The reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.missingToken: No reset token found in the URL. Please check the link received by email.
resetPassword.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again or request a new link.

forgotPassword.trigger: Lost your password in the abyss? Click here
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address. If an account is associated, you will receive a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If your address is on record, you will receive an email shortly. Don't forget to check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

detailedLogs.title: Detailed Dive Logs
detailedLogs.description: Record every detail of your underwater journey. Depth, duration, location, and equipment - keep it all organized.

statistics.title: Advanced Statistics
statistics.description: Visualize your progress with comprehensive charts. Track your bottom time, depth trends, and more.

community.description: Share your best dives with friends or the community. Discover new spots and get inspired.
